title: The Giant Jack Becomes the Road
description: After Enel’s defeat, Skypiea begins to heal as enemies, allies, and the Straw Hats gather around the miracle of the bell.
scene: Across pages 8, 9, 10, 11, this scene focuses on Luffy, Enel, Noland, Calgara, Nami. After Enel’s defeat, Skypiea begins to heal as enemies, allies, and the Straw Hats gather around the miracle of the bell.

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: Making them appear like giant monsters...

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: Then the identity of those monsters are...

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Was up there all along, was it...?

summary: After Enel’s defeat, Skypiea begins to heal as enemies, allies, and the Straw Hats gather around the miracle of the bell.
